title: Full Conversations
description: Complete back-and-forth conversations. You play one role — pick the right line and keep the flow going.
culturalNote: Real Delhi conversations are fast, warm, and full of everything you've learned: fillers, code-switching, 'yaar', 'arre', 'na'. Don't aim for perfect grammar — aim for natural rhythm. If you hesitate less, you sound more fluent.

exercises.context: You (B) are meeting your friend Priya (A) for chai. You haven't seen her in a while.

lines.speaker: A
lines.hindi: Arre yaar, kahan thi tu? Bahut dino baad dikh rahi hai!
lines.english: Oh man, where were you? Haven't seen you in so long!

lines.speaker: B
lines.hindi: Yaar, bahut kaam tha. Ekdum busy rahi.
lines.english: Man, there was so much work. I was totally busy.
options: Yaar, bahut kaam tha. Ekdum busy rahi.

lines.speaker: A
lines.hindi: Acha! Toh ab kaisa chal raha hai sab?
lines.english: Oh right! So how's everything going now?

lines.speaker: B
lines.hindi: Haan ab thoda better hai. Chal, chai peete hain na?
lines.english: Yeah it's a bit better now. Come on, let's have chai, right?
options: Haan ab thoda better hai. Chal, chai peete hain na?

lines.speaker: A
lines.hindi: Bilkul yaar, chal! Maine order kar diya.
lines.english: Absolutely man, let's go! I've already ordered.

lines.speaker: B
lines.hindi: Arre, itni jaldi? Kya mangaya?
lines.english: Oh wow, so fast? What did you order?

exercises.context: You (B) are on the phone with your friend Rahul (A). He's calling to make plans.

lines.speaker: A
lines.hindi: Haan bata.
lines.english: Yeah, tell me.

lines.speaker: B
lines.hindi: Arre Rahul! Kal free hai tu?
lines.english: Hey Rahul! Are you free tomorrow?
options: Arre Rahul! Kal free hai tu?
Pata nahi, call karo baad mein.

lines.speaker: A
lines.hindi: Kal? Haan, shaam ko free hoon. Kya plan hai?
lines.english: Tomorrow? Yeah, I'm free in the evening. What's the plan?

lines.speaker: B
lines.hindi: Woh naya restaurant khula hai na CP mein — chal wahan chalte hain?
lines.english: That new restaurant opened in CP, right — shall we go there?
options: Woh naya restaurant khula hai na CP mein — chal wahan chalte hain?
Pata nahi, mujhe bhook nahi hai.
Aaj nahi yaar, bahut thak gayi.

lines.speaker: A
lines.hindi: Haan yaar, suna hai bahut acha hai! Kitne baje?
lines.english: Yes man, I've heard it's really good! What time?

lines.speaker: B
lines.hindi: Saat baje? Theek hai?
lines.english: 7 o'clock? Is that okay?

lines.speaker: A
lines.hindi: Bilkul! Chal, kal milte hain. Bye!
lines.english: Absolutely! Alright, see you tomorrow. Bye!

lines.speaker: B
lines.hindi: Haan chal, bye!
lines.english: Yeah alright, bye!

exercises.context: You (B) are at a dhaba ordering food. The waiter (A) comes to take your order.

lines.speaker: A
lines.hindi: Haan didi, kya loge?
lines.english: Yes sister, what will you have?

lines.speaker: B
lines.hindi: Bhaiya, yahan kya acha hai? Kya recommend karoge?
lines.english: Brother, what's good here? What would you recommend?
options: Bhaiya, yahan kya acha hai? Kya recommend karoge?

lines.speaker: A
lines.hindi: Didi, dal makhani bahut acha hai aur butter naan try karein.
lines.english: Sister, the dal makhani is very good and try the butter naan.

lines.speaker: B
lines.hindi: Theek hai, ek dal makhani aur do butter naan. Aur haan — teekha thoda kam karna.
lines.english: Okay, one dal makhani and two butter naan. And yes — make it a little less spicy.
options: Theek hai, ek dal makhani aur do butter naan. Aur haan — teekha thoda kam karna.

lines.speaker: A
lines.hindi: Ji didi, aur kuch?
lines.english: Yes sister, anything else?

lines.speaker: B
lines.hindi: Ek lassi bhi lao. Aur bhaiya, kitna time lagega?
lines.english: Bring one lassi too. And brother, how long will it take?
options: Ek lassi bhi lao. Aur bhaiya, kitna time lagega?

lines.speaker: A
lines.hindi: Bas 10 minute didi.
lines.english: Just 10 minutes, sister.

exercises.context: You (B) are shopping for a kurta at Sarojini Nagar market. The shopkeeper (A) shows you something.

lines.speaker: A
lines.hindi: Didi, dekho yeh naya collection hai, bahut acha hai.
lines.english: Sister, look this is a new collection, it's very nice.

lines.speaker: B
lines.hindi: Haan acha hai. Yeh kitne ka hai?
lines.english: Yeah it's nice. How much is this?
options: Haan acha hai. Yeh kitne ka hai?

lines.speaker: A
lines.hindi: Yeh paanch sau ka hai didi.
lines.english: This is 500 rupees, sister.

lines.speaker: B
lines.hindi: Arre yaar, paanch sau? Bahut mehenga hai. Thoda kam karo na.
lines.english: Oh man, 500? That's very expensive. Reduce it a little.
options: Arre yaar, paanch sau? Bahut mehenga hai. Thoda kam karo na.
Haan theek hai, le leti hoon.
Pata nahi, soch ke batati hoon.

lines.speaker: A
lines.hindi: Didi, pakka price hai. Quality dekho.
lines.english: Sister, this is the fixed price. Look at the quality.

lines.speaker: B
lines.hindi: Chaar sau mein doge? Last price batao.
lines.english: Will you give it for 400? Tell me the last price.
options: Chaar sau mein doge? Last price batao.
Theek hai, paanch sau le lo.

lines.speaker: A
lines.hindi: Chaar sau pachaas, bas. Final hai.
lines.english: Four fifty, that's it. Final.

lines.speaker: B
lines.hindi: Theek hai yaar, le leti hoon. Cash hoga.
lines.english: Okay fine, I'll take it. It'll be cash.
options: Theek hai yaar, le leti hoon. Cash hoga.
Nahi, bahut mehenga hai abhi bhi.

exercises.context: You (B) are talking to your friend Sanya (A). She can tell something's wrong and asks how you are.

lines.speaker: A
lines.hindi: Yaar, sab theek? Kuch pareshaan lag rahi ho.
lines.english: Man, everything okay? You seem a bit worried.

lines.speaker: B
lines.hindi: Haan yaar, bas thodi si thaki hoon. Kuch nahi.
lines.english: Yeah man, just a little tired. Nothing much.
options: Haan yaar, bas thodi si thaki hoon. Kuch nahi.
Bahut maza aa raha hai aaj.

lines.speaker: A
lines.hindi: Pakka? Bol na yaar, kya hua?
lines.english: Sure? Tell me man, what happened?

lines.speaker: B
lines.hindi: Sach boluun? Kaam se bahut bore ho gayi hoon. Thoda break chahiye.
lines.english: Should I say the truth? I'm really bored of work. I need a little break.
options: Sach boluun? Kaam se bahut bore ho gayi hoon. Thoda break chahiye.
Haan bilkul theek hoon, tension mat lo.
Pata nahi, dekh lenge baad mein.

lines.speaker: A
lines.hindi: Acha yaar, sahi bol rahi ho. Chal kal outing pe chalte hain, dono?
lines.english: Oh man, you're right. Come on, let's go out tomorrow, both of us?

lines.speaker: B
lines.hindi: Arre haan yaar! Bahut acha lagega. Pakka chalte hain.
lines.english: Oh yes man! That'll feel so good. We're definitely going.
options: Arre haan yaar! Bahut acha lagega. Pakka chalte hain.
Nahi yaar, dil nahi kar raha.
